name: Cresud S.A.C.I.F. y A. Warrant
summary: Cresud S.A.C.I.F. y A. is an Argentine agricultural company involved in the production of grains, oilseeds, livestock, and dairy products. The company owns and operates farms in Argentina and other South American countries. Cresud S.A.C.I.F. y A. is headquartered in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
